high_expected_error_rejection_rate.observable: Riskier actions are rejected when expected error is high.

post_error_conservative_shift.observable: Error signals trigger conservative follow-up choices.

novel_action_ratio.observable: Information-seeking actions are favored in uncertainty.

choice_repeat_suppression.observable: Repeated action streaks shorten when exploration rises.

dominant_attention_share.observable: Attention concentrates on the strongest evidence feature.

evidence_aligned_choice_rate.observable: Chosen actions align with the dominant evidence channel.

confidence_evidence_slope.observable: Confidence rises with stronger evidence separation.

high_evidence_commit_rate.observable: Commit wins more often once evidence becomes strong.

mean_update_inverse.observable: Prediction errors yield smaller internal updates.

strategy_persistence_after_error.observable: After error, action policy changes more slowly.

high_pressure_low_cost_ratio.observable: Low-cost actions dominate under resource pressure.

recovery_trigger_rate.observable: Recovery triggers when energy and time are low.

conflict_avoidance_shift.observable: Imagined loss signals bias decisions away from direct commit.
